FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: Risk-On Dollar Weakness as US-Iran Stalemate Extends
tldr_points: Broad USD sold as US–Iran talks deferred elevates geopolitical uncertainty and stalls safe-haven repatriation into JPY shorts
US equity record closes and risk-on tone compress long-dollar positioning, weakening USD/JPY technical structure
Policy cancellation and diplomatic delays reduce near-term conviction for US fiscal or geopolitical catalysts supporting the dollar
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY underperforms on delayed US–Iran dialogue and equity-led risk-on; structure favors downside toward lower MA tiers.
FX.comment: Risk-on equity strength and delayed US–Iran resolution favor USD/JPY downside toward MA support.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Earnings Momentum and Tech Sector Strength Offset Geopolitical Risk
tldr_points: Major tech earnings (AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL) provide fundamental catalyst amid Q1 reporting season
Tech sector rotation continues with semiconductor volatility (NVTS +31% vs TEL -12%)
Iran geopolitical risk elevated but contained; market pricing in diplomatic resolution
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 positioned for upside as tech earnings accelerate and geopolitical risk remains contained
STOCKS.comment: Earnings catalyst and intact technical structure support upside; geopolitical risk contained

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Inflows and Macro Tailwinds Support Bullish Continuation
tldr_points: Institutional adoption accelerates via tokenization narrative despite JPMorgan's cautious outlook
Regulatory headwinds for prediction markets signal increased scrutiny but do not impact BTC fundamentals
Technical structure remains constructive with MA20 acting as dynamic support
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD positioned for upside as institutional flows and macro conditions outweigh regulatory noise.
CRYPTO.comment: Bullish structure intact; buy dips toward MA20 support with defined risk
